Name: departments_aggregate
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments") SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*), 'sum', json_build_object('budget', SUM("budget")), 'avg', json_build_object('budget', AVG("budget")), 'max', json_build_object('budget', MAX("budget")), 'min', json_build_object('budget', MIN("budget")), 'stddev', json_build_object('budget', STDDEV("budget")), 'stddev_pop', json_build_object('budget', STDDEV_POP("budget")), 'stddev_samp', json_build_object('budget', STDDEV_SAMP("budget")), 'variance', json_build_object('budget', VARIANCE("budget")), 'var_pop', json_build_object('budget', VAR_POP("budget")), 'var_samp', json_build_object('budget', VAR_SAMP("budget"))) FROM "_root.base")) AS "departments_aggregate"
